codeReview.summary: Clean, minimal fix that correctly narrows /user/ pathname matching from a prefix check to an exact 2-segment match. The implementation splits the pathname, filters empty segments, and only classifies as creator-profile when exactly ['user', '<id>'] is present. All other /user/* nested paths fall through to unsupported. Tests cover the exact reported VAL-INTAKE-007 URL, additional nested-path variants, and the intake route layer. Existing canonical creator-profile tests continue to pass, confirming no regression. The commit is well-scoped: 3 files changed, 71 insertions, 1 deletion.

summary: Pass. The implementation correctly rejects nested Douyin user-search URLs (e.g. /user/self/search/...) by tightening the /user/ pathname classifier from a prefix match to an exact 2-segment match. Five new tests cover both domain classification and intake route rejection for the reported URL and related nested-path variants. The worker followed TDD procedure, verified with agent-browser, and ran the full validation suite. No code issues, no shared-state gaps identified.
